title: Rebedding & Repointing
content:
Rebedding And Repointing

Are you searching for a rebedding and repointing service in the South East, Mornington Peninsula or Bayside? Call Sandhurst Roofing on 0448 812 800 for expert advice and a competitive quote.

Roof Re-bedding & Roof Re-pointing

Bedding and pointing is the cement work on a tiled roof that secures and waterproofs the ridge capping, gable ends and valleys. It’s vital that the bedding and pointing is in good condition because this will protect your property from leaking, pests and storm damage. If you have a leaking roof, call us today and we will assess whether your roof requires our specialist rebedding and repointing service.

Why Re-bed And Re-point Your Roof With Sandhurst?

We take the time to thoroughly explain the process in a way that you will understand, we also provide a fast, reliable and affordable service. Bedding and Pointing are extremely important parts of a tiled roof, without them the roof would become water logged and mouldy. Mould is extremely dangerous, don't risk your families health, call the professionals at Sandhurst Roofing today.

If you're in need of some roofing help contact Sandhurst Roofing today on 0448 812 800. We will be more than happy to organise an onsite quote, alternatively, you can fill out the form below and we will get back to you shortly.
